description: Represents an AWS IoT Greengrass V2 component, which is a software module deployed to Greengrass core devices.

Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the component.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[^:]*:greengrass:[^:]*:(aws|[0-9]+):components:[^:]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ComponentName.markdownDescription:
The name of the component.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: Replacement

Key.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.markdownDescription:
Tags associated with the component.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: Replacement

Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the component.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[^:]*:greengrass:[^:]*:(aws|[0-9]+):components:[^:]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
